name: io.github.crackerrrrrr/design-to-unity
title: Design to Unity
description: Convert Lanhu, Figma, PSD, and Photoshop UI designs into Unity UGUI handoff data.

environmentVariables.name: MCP_TRANSPORT
environmentVariables.description: Run Design to Unity as a stdio MCP server.

environmentVariables.name: LANHU_COOKIE
environmentVariables.description: Lanhu request Cookie header value for private Lanhu project access.

environmentVariables.name: DDS_COOKIE
environmentVariables.description: Optional DDS cookie. Defaults to LANHU_COOKIE when omitted.

environmentVariables.name: FIGMA_TOKEN
environmentVariables.description: Figma personal access token for private Figma files.

environmentVariables.name: FIGMA_OAUTH_TOKEN
environmentVariables.description: Optional Figma OAuth token. Used instead of FIGMA_TOKEN when provided.

environmentVariables.name: DATA_DIR
environmentVariables.description: Local packet and asset cache directory.
